title: Linear Algebra — Essentials
description: Matrix multiply, inverse 2×2, determinant, and eigenvalue equation.

blocks.title: 2×2 inverse
blocks.latex: \begin{pmatrix} a & b \\ c & d \end{pmatrix}^{-1} = \frac{1}{ad-bc}\begin{pmatrix} d & -b \\ -c & a \end{pmatrix}

blocks.title: Determinant 2×2
blocks.latex: \det\begin{pmatrix} a & b \\ c & d \end{pmatrix} = ad - bc

blocks.title: Solve Av = λv
blocks.mermaid:
flowchart TD
  A[Form A - λI] --> B[det = 0]
  B --> C[Find eigenvalues λ]
  C --> D[Nullspace for each λ]
  D --> E[Normalize eigenvectors]
